channel.title: GitHub PHP Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of PHP in GitHub

item.title: nextcloud/server
item.description: ☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

item.title: firefly-iii/firefly-iii
item.description: Firefly III: a personal finances manager

item.title: filamentphp/filament
item.description: A collection of beautiful full-stack components for Laravel. The perfect starting point for your next app. Using Livewire, Alpine.js and Tailwind CSS.

item.title: laravel/framework
item.description: The Laravel Framework.

item.title: danielmiessler/SecLists
item.description: SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

item.title: Dolibarr/dolibarr
item.description: Dolibarr ERP CRM is a modern software package to manage your company or foundation's activity (contacts, suppliers, invoices, orders, stocks, agenda, accounting, ...). it's an open source Web application (written in PHP) designed for businesses of any sizes, foundations and freelancers.

item.title: guzzle/guzzle
item.description: Guzzle, an extensible PHP HTTP client

item.title: sebastianbergmann/phpunit
item.description: The PHP Unit Testing framework.

item.title: snipe/snipe-it
item.description: A free open source IT asset/license management system

item.title: Automattic/jetpack
item.description: Security, performance, marketing, and design tools — Jetpack is made by WordPress experts to make WP sites safer and faster, and help you grow your traffic.

item.title: composer/composer
item.description: Dependency Manager for PHP

item.title: elementor/elementor
item.description: The most advanced frontend drag & drop page builder. Create high-end, pixel perfect websites at record speeds. Any theme, any page, any design.

item.title: PHP-CS-Fixer/PHP-CS-Fixer
item.description: A tool to automatically fix PHP Coding Standards issues

item.title: WordPress/wordpress-develop
item.description: WordPress Develop, Git-ified. Synced from git://develop.git.wordpress.org/, including branches and tags! This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please include a link to a pre-existing ticket on https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ with every pull request.

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source & self-hostable Heroku / Netlify / Vercel alternative.

item.title: cweagans/composer-patches
item.description: Simple patches plugin for Composer

item.title: nextcloud/all-in-one
item.description: 📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

item.title: librenms/librenms
item.description: Community-based GPL-licensed network monitoring system

item.title: jeroennoten/Laravel-AdminLTE
item.description: Easy AdminLTE integration with Laravel

item.title: LinkStackOrg/LinkStack
item.description: LinkStack - the ultimate solution for creating a personalized & professional profile page. Showcase all your important links in one place, forget the limitation of one link on social media. Set up your personal site on your own server with just a few clicks.

item.title: v2board/v2board
item.description: 🚀A multiple proxy protocol manage panel application interface

item.title: drush-ops/drush
item.description: Drush is a command-line shell and scripting interface for Drupal, a veritable Swiss Army knife designed to make life easier for those who spend their working hours hacking away at the command prompt.
